life-description: Thoughts on life, perspectives on things, and observations about society are all written here.
review-description: Reviews of various works I have watched or read — these may be structured reviews or simply random thoughts about the work. Other works I have finished but have not written about are listed in:
software-description: Difficulties and technical notes from software development, with occasional workplace reflections. I haven't been updating this section very actively, but I hope to write more going forward.
random-description: Pick a random post for the present you.
guestbook-description: Leave a note, share your website, or simply let me know you passed by.
database-description: The grand hope here is to collect every novel, manga, anime, film, and series I have read or watched, then start writing impressions from the works I love, so I can record and never forget the feelings each one stirred in me. The list is still incomplete and I am working on it!
now-description: Where I am, recent updates, and what I am doing now.
